brief: Global tensions rise as US-Iran conflict widens and oil prices surge, while the World Cup final sees political boos. Meanwhile, research on AI advice shows it boosts confidence but undermines accuracy, and studies examine writing processes and human-robot collaboration.
news_summary: Tensions escalate in the Middle East with US-Iran conflict and oil prices crossing $90; World Cup final sees Trump and Infantino booed; a flash flood in Utah kills five; a ferry sinks off Guyana; Russia strikes Kyiv; UK's Burnham set to become PM.
papers_summary: Research finds AI advice makes people more confident but less accurate, while other studies explore ChatGPT's impact on writing, pause patterns in composition, and human-robot juggling dynamics.

en.brief: Global tensions rise as US-Iran conflict widens and oil prices surge, while the World Cup final sees political boos. Meanwhile, research on AI advice shows it boosts confidence but undermines accuracy, and studies examine writing processes and human-robot collaboration.
en.news_summary: Tensions escalate in the Middle East with US-Iran conflict and oil prices crossing $90; World Cup final sees Trump and Infantino booed; a flash flood in Utah kills five; a ferry sinks off Guyana; Russia strikes Kyiv; UK's Burnham set to become PM.
en.papers_summary: Research finds AI advice makes people more confident but less accurate, while other studies explore ChatGPT's impact on writing, pause patterns in composition, and human-robot juggling dynamics.

zh.brief: 今日新闻聚焦双生姐妹矮小身材揭示癌症预防线索、揭阳虐狗案引发全球声援、以及欧洲热浪推动中国空调需求。研究方面关注AI编码代理的安全漏洞及写作中的名词复杂性。
zh.news_summary: 双生姐妹身材矮小却为癌症预防提供关键线索；揭阳虐狗案引爆国内外舆论，呼吁动物保护立法；欧洲热浪下中国空调需求激增，或改善中国制造形象。
zh.papers_summary: 论文涉及AI编码代理被利用的安全风险、科学可视化素养基准测试，以及中国英语写作中名词短语复杂性的发展路径。

todays_image.caption: The spreading seeds of the Crepis barbigera, often mistaken for native flora, mirror how a remark about national identity can drift into unintended interpretation.
todays_image.title: Crepis barbigera Leiberg
